name: Clerk Waitlist
description: Read and summarize Clerk waitlist entries through the Clerk Backend API.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Verify CLERK_SECRET_KEY and confirm the Clerk waitlist API is reachable.

tools.name: list_entries
tools.description: List Clerk waitlist entries with optional status, email/ID query, ordering, and pagination filters.

status.description: Optional status filter: pending, invited, completed, or rejected.

query.description: Optional email address or waitlist entry ID search.

order_by.description: Sort field, optionally prefixed with + or -. Defaults to -created_at.

limit.description: Entries per request, from 1 to 500. Defaults to 25.

offset.description: Number of entries to skip. Defaults to 0.

tools.name: get_entry
tools.description: Fetch one Clerk waitlist entry by its exact waitlist entry ID.

tools.name: summarize
tools.description: Return compact waitlist totals, status counts, and oldest/newest creation timestamps.

fetch_all.description: Fetch all pages before summarizing. Defaults to true.

page_size.description: Page size from 1 to 500. Defaults to 500.

env.CLERK_SECRET_KEY: Required Clerk Backend API secret key
